title: × cephalophrys integra
intro: × Cephalophrys integra is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae, commonly known as a type of tropical herb. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of × Cephalophrys integra include its ability to alleviate symptoms of fever, headache, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into tea, poultices, or infusions, which can be applied topically or taken orally for its medicinal effects.
